documentation.description: Containers used elsewhere in the MDP packages.

generic_instantiations.name: State_Actions_Maps
generic_instantiations.code:
package State_Actions_Maps is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Hashed_Maps
  (State.Object_Id,
   Action.Object_Lists.List,
   State.Hash,
   State."=",
   Action.Object_Lists."=");
